feed.title: SAP Community - User Experience
feed.subtitle: User Experience Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Candidate Experience
entry.content: Is there a method for candidates to create a master file or other; so they can import rather than re-enter their data across various companies?

entry.title: Customizing Layout (VA02) Create Sales Order Window
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm new to SAP.

Looking for ways to speed up data entry by customizing the layout in my sales inquiry windows such as the window in transactions like "Create Quotation" and "Create Sales Order".

I've discovered how to customize the line items box to move unessential fields out of view - but one thing that is bugging me is the limited size of the box where you enter line items.

Currently I can only see 3 lines on screen at any given point before having to scroll - is there anyway to expand this box to show more lines on screen at once?

Thank you,

entry.title: Tab across fields with tooltip no longer possible?
entry.content:
Afternoon, All!

Since the implementation of SAP ByDesign upgrade 2311, we have noticed that if you use "tab across" to move from field to field, it does not work any more if the next field is marked with a question mark/tooltip help button. You are stuck and need to use the mouse function to move fields again. I tried in our Production and UAT systems, in Chrome and Edge - all the same.

This has really thrown our supplier invoice processing team as they knew exactly how many tab across they needed to get to the correct fields for faster processing. This was also not listed in the list of changes for the upgrade. Anyone got any idea?

entry.title: P-user registration
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We need to register for a P-user id. I have a S-user id linked with Universal id.
Below is the Blog which i am following, but there is no option to register.
Creating a P-User in SAP Cloud Platform to Practise SAP HANA. | SAP Blogs

Regards,
Manoj.

entry.title: REPORTING USER VALIDITY PERIOD
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Can anyone tell me how to report the validity period (valid from, valid to) of Users in SAP?

Thank you,

Bernadett

entry.title: User Logs - Analysis for Movements
entry.content:
Hello everyone  , 

i want to see the transactions that some user , used.

How can I have these log files concerning all movements per user, for a period that i will define?

Thanks

entry.title: PO Amendment
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm new user to SAP and my current company using old version (SAP Business one 9.2) of SAP as I got to know. Currently once PO raised and approved changes cannot be made in any case. (before sending to supplier, Ex-Qty increment/Price changes due to later added discounts). Is there any possibility to amend the PO atleast by PO approved user?

entry.title: In S4 Hana public cloud, is it OK to delete locked business users?
entry.content:
In S4 Hana public cloud, is it OK to delete locked business users in the 'Maintain Business Users' app?

There is a delete button, but just wanted to check if anybody has hit any problems after deletion.  For example, any transactional data entered by the deleted user, could that cause an issue?

Many Thanks

Alan Roddie

entry.title: Division by Zero Error
entry.content:
I’m getting a division by zero error with the below formula. Not sure how to edit the formula so it checks for a zero. I have tried the if statements I have found but I keep getting errors. 

 

(Sum ({@Profit},{@Group By} )/Sum ({@Sales w FRT},{@Group By} ))*100

entry.title: UI5 free style app with odatav2 and odatav4 service consumption
entry.content:
Hi folks,
I need to develop a ui5 free style app which needs to consume odata v4 (sap capm) service as well as odata v2(on premise) service. As this is my first time dealing with this type of scenario, Just wanted to know that Is there any problems that I may encounter while developing? And is it okay to use 2 different versions of odata in same application.

Thanks in Advance.

Regards

Rakesh

Rakesh Baggam

entry.title: Recommended approach for Fiori Adapt UI in S/4H On-Premise system (Customizing client) with no data
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

For a client's S/4HANA greenfield implementation with Private Cloud (RISE with SAP), there are two clients in the Development system i.e. Customizing client (400) and Test Client (410). The client has decided not to allow any (test) data creation in client 400 but only in test client 410 (this approach seems standard in many projects).

To implement Fiori Adapt-UI enhancements and test Key-User Extensibility, we need those UI screens where we want to implement changes. For example, to change something on a Product (detail) screen, we need to navigate from the Products list in the Manage Product Master Data Fiori app. But without any data, this navigation is not possible.

The question is, what is the best or recommended to work on such Enhancements? Should we allow such Enhancements in the Test client which means also the possibility of creating a Transport Request where such enhancements could be locked for further systems?

Had anyone been in a similar system environment and what kind of approach was used there?

SAP Fiori Launchpad SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition @Jocelyn_Dart @MioYasutake

entry.title: Issues with Horizon theme in Company Structure Overview
entry.content:
With the Horizon theme being applied to the Company Structure Overview in the 1H 2024 release (WEF-133809), I see a couple of issues, as highlighted in the image below, with the before on the left and after on the right:

  1. The colors configured in "Edit Layout" for each object do not appear anywhere on the object card. These colors should either be displayed somewhere like before (my preference), or the option to set them should be removed.
  2. The new icon for Positions does not represent Positions as clearly as the old one did.

entry.title: 1H 2024 - KM18020 - Create Same-Level Position
entry.content: The below text change that is part of KM18020 is inconsistent with the item right above it. Why wouldn't the new text be "Add Same-Level Position" instead of "Create Same-Level Position"?

entry.title: Could someone please tell me what i need to do to add another column to this query that i have, i wa
entry.content:
Can somebody please help me to add a new column to a query that i have already. I want to add a column to show "the last purchase price" The query i have currently is as follows. Any help would be much appreciated.

Thankyou in advance.

SELECT T0.[ItemCode], T1.[ItemName], T0.[OnHand], T0.[OnOrder], T0.[IsCommited] as 'Sales BOs'

, ISNULL((select Sum( T3.[Quantity]) FROM OINV T2 INNER JOIN INV1 T3 ON T3.[DocEntry] = T2.[DocEntry]

    WHERE T0.Itemcode = T3.Itemcode and (T2.[DocDate] >= [%0] and T2.[DocDate] <= [%1])),0) as 'QTY Sold in Period'

, ISNULL((select Sum( T5.[Quantity]) FROM ORIN T4 INNER JOIN RIN1 T5 ON T5.[DocEntry] = T4.[DocEntry]

    WHERE T0.Itemcode = T5.Itemcode and (T4.[DocDate] >= [%0] and T4.[DocDate] <= [%1])),0) as 'QTY Returned In Period'

 

FROM OITW T0  INNER JOIN OITM T1 ON T0.[ItemCode] = T1.[ItemCode] and T1.[DfltWH] = '01' and T0.[WhsCode] = '01'

Where T1.[ItemCode] >= [%3] and T1.[ItemCode] <= [%4]

entry.title: Infotype 2001 keep opening screen number 2000 but only for certain users.
entry.content:
I had already configured table T554S for an absence type that would deduct a quota as below 

I can open it normally and it would show screen number 2001,

But when another user wanted to create a new IT2001 record the screen number that appear for them is 2000

What could be the cause of the screen differences between our user?

entry.title: Which one is preferred: Adapt UI or Adaptation Projects?
entry.content:
There are many good blogs/docs about key user UI Adaptation at Runtime to customize Fiori apps and create variants, and many good blogs about developer Adaptation projects in BAS at Design time.

But which method is preferred?

Assuming only developers will be making customizations (not key users) and no additional controller logic extensions are needed, which method should be used? 

Runtime Adaptations are easier with less overhead. But I'd like to see what other people think.

Thanks

entry.title: Why can't I send invoices in "Release Blocked Invoices"?
entry.content:
I'm trying to send Invoices out of the application "Release Blocked Invoices" (MRBR), but it's not working.

Can someone let me know where the problem can be?
The recipients are stored corectly in the system.

What is "Type" standing for? 

UI SAP Business Client (NWBC)  User Experience CRM Master Data

entry.title: i have only Puser ID and i that case how to access the SAP notes
entry.content:
I have only P user ID. I am independent SAP consultant. In that case how to access the SAP notes for learning / preparation and future consulting assignment work. Please share your suggestion so that it would help for independent consultants like me.

 

Thank you,

Venkat

entry.title: SuccessFactors Mobile App - Timesheet to network codes/work orders functionality workaround
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

We currently using the time tracking functionality on the SuccessFactors mobile application, however due to the limitations of the app, our employees cannot assign their time to a specific network code/work order.

Have any other SuccessFactors customers faced the same issue and if so, how have you worked around it so that your employees can accurately and easily apply their time to the correct costing project.

Thank you!

entry.title: Homepage - how to change Custom Cards layout
entry.content:
Hi all,

I've added two custom cards to a custom folder within Organisational Updates. The cards are working fine and displaying correctly but they are displaying 'vertically' i.e. one is showing underneath the other.

I want them to display across the page i.e. horizontally (in same way as the layout of the Quick Action cards at the top of the homepage) - can I do this and if so, how do I do it? See image below for how they are currently displaying, red arrow shows where I want the custom card to appear. Please note, it's not the order of the cards I'm questioning, it's the layout i.e. horizontal instead of vertical.

Any help is much appreciated!

Thanks.
